a_image.alt: Animecore style mood board — Aesthetic · Anime-Inspired

sections.a_eyebrow: Bold Colors · Vibrant · Playful · Cute · Expressive
sections.a_description: Bold hot pinks, dramatic purple depths, and the explosive visual energy of Japanese animation — Animecore brings the dynamic expressiveness of anime aesthetics to web design. The vibrant accent colors pop against deep blue-purple backgrounds like cel-shaded highlights, while rounded typography and playful containers capture the friendly approachability of anime character design.

This vibrant style powers anime fan community platforms, manga reading sites, J-pop artist pages, and anime merchandise stores. You'll see it on cosplay portfolio sites, anime convention pages, fan art galleries, and gaming community hubs — anywhere that the visual language needs to channel the colorful energy, emotional expressiveness, and unabashed boldness of Japanese animation culture.

The vibrant, expressive aesthetic of anime-inspired web design — bold colors, dramatic contrasts, and the energetic visual language of Japanese animation translated into UI. Background: deep blue-purple (#1a1040) — the dramatic night sky of anime scenes. The .inner panel has a slightly lighter background (#221550) with a 2px border in hot pink (#ff3e8a) and 12px border-radius — bold and eye-catching like anime cel shading. Colors: hot pink (#ff3e8a) as the primary accent — the energy of magical girl transformations and action sequences. Bright white (#ffffff) for headings, soft lavender (#c0a8e0) for body text. Secondary cyan (#00e5ff) for highlights. The aesthetic is energetic, colorful, and expressive — every element has the dynamic intensity of a key animation frame. Set in M PLUS Rounded 1c — a rounded Japanese font that captures the friendly, expressive quality of anime title cards. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.3, color #ffffff. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #ff3e8a. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #c0a8e0. Buttons: primary — hot pink (#ff3e8a), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, cyan border (#00e5ff). Alternatives: Kosugi Maru (rounded Japanese), Zen Maru Gothic (modern rounded).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
